title: Klaviyo vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Omnisend: pricing, features, and performance for e-commerce email and SMS marketing.
h1: Klaviyo vs Omnisend: Detailed Comparison for E-commerce Brands
intro: Both Klaviyo and Omnisend are powerful email and SMS platforms built specifically for e-commerce businesses. While they share similar core features and freemium models, they differ in pricing, feature depth, and best-use scenarios. This comparison helps you determine which platform aligns best with your marketing needs and budget.
choose_a_if: You need advanced predictive analytics and behavioral insights for sophisticated segmentation
You prioritize deep e-commerce integrations, particularly with Shopify or WooCommerce
You want a more established platform (founded 2012) with higher G2 ratings (4.6 vs 4.5)
choose_b_if: You have a tight budget and want to start paid plans at just $16/month
You need push notifications alongside email and SMS for true omnichannel marketing
You prefer a platform with stronger Trustpilot ratings (4.6 vs 3.8) and an affiliate program

faq.a: Klaviyo offers more advanced features like predictive analytics and deeper e-commerce integrations, making it better for sophisticated marketing automation. However, Omnisend excels in ease of use, affordability, and customer satisfaction scores, making it superior for budget-conscious businesses or beginners.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Omnisend?
faq.a: Omnisend is significantly cheaper, starting at $16/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month for paid plans. Both offer free tiers, though Klaviyo provides more free contacts (500 vs 250), which may offset the lower entry price for very small businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your contact lists and data between platforms, though the process requires manual export and import or API integration. Both platforms support standard data formats, making the transition feasible, though you may lose some workflow history and customizations during the switch.
